title: Dataset of "Identity crisis: exploring the boundaries of cell type identification in the age of single cell transcriptomics"
author: Herman, Melissa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw and filtered output from Cell Ranger, Cell Bender filtered output (removal of ambient RNA), annotated processed data, and lists of differentially expressed genes.
steps_raw: Raw and filtered output from Cell Ranger, Cell Bender filtered output (removal of ambient RNA), annotated processed data, and lists of differentially expressed genes.
